mapper.select: select (case job when 1 then '班主任' when 2 then '讲师' when 3 then '学工主管' when 4 then '教研主管' when 5 then '咨询师' else '其它' end) job, count(id) data from emp group by job
select (case gender when 1 then '男性员工' when 2 then '女性员工' else '其它' end) gender, count(id) value from emp group by gender
